title: stenomesson fulvum
intro: Stenomesson fulvum, also known as the yellow onion flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stenomesson fulvum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing irritated throats. Herbal preparations of Stenomesson fulvum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
